# UH APEX local routing for Houston and ZIP 77084

Review date: 2026-06-28
Organization: UH APEX Accelerator
Local area: Houston area, example ZIP 77084
Office or partner: UH APEX Accelerator, University of Houston Bauer College of Business

## BOSS routing summary
Use when a Houston-area user is legally formed, for-profit, and wants help selling to federal, state, or local government.

## Local service area
- UH APEX serves a 28-county area including Harris, Fort Bend, Waller, Brazoria, Galveston, Chambers, Liberty, Jefferson, Orange, Hardin, and other counties.
- ZIP 77084 requires exact address and county verification.
- Physical business address matters; do not rely on a PO box.

## Local services or resource types
- No-cost one-on-one procurement advising
- Training and on-demand webinars
- Registrations and certifications education
- Market research
- Solicitation assistance
- Federal, state, and local procurement links

## Best-fit users
- Legally formed for-profit businesses
- Businesses selling products or services government agencies buy
- Businesses preparing for contracts or certifications

## BOSS intake questions
- What is your business ZIP code, county, and physical operating address?
- Are you operating from home, online, mobile, commercial space, or multiple locations?
- Are you looking for startup help, existing-business advising, funding readiness, contracts, permits, certifications, training, or mentoring?
- Is the business already legally formed and for-profit?

## Recommended next action
Verify exact address/county and legal/for-profit status. If eligible, route to UH APEX services and counseling; if not formed, route to SBDC/SCORE first.
